Error Message: Minified React error #185 - Maximum update depth exceeded
User Impact: Site crashes completely - users cannot use calculator
Root Cause: TooltipProvider incorrectly nested inside each tooltip component instead of at root level
Notes: First occurrence in DealCalculatorV3 (fixed earlier same day). Second occurrence in DealCalculatorV2. Pattern: Each InputTooltip component wrapped in its own TooltipProvider, causing nested providers when multiple tooltips rendered. Fixed by moving TooltipProvider to component root.
